methodsAttempted.query: Previous run had sc-nus-4 (ai.nus.edu.sg/research/ai-governance-and-policy/) as JS-rendered. Operator instructed to evaluate honestly — if research showcase, reject with research_showcase_only.
methodsAttempted.notes: ai.nus.edu.sg verified via OpenCLI browser. Page confirmed as NUS AI Institute research thrust page — NOT an institutional policy page.

Page content: 'This research thrust will draw on diverse bodies of scholarship to address these and other questions that examine the actual and potential impact — positive and negative — of AI.' Lists research team members (Prof. Simon Chesterman, Prof. Hahn Jungpil, etc.), AI Governance Roundtables (industry/government/academia discussions), and updates. No institutional policy for students/staff. This is a research showcase page.

summary: REPAIR run: ai.nus.edu.sg/research/ai-governance-and-policy/ verified via OpenCLI browser. Page is the NUS AI Institute's research thrust on AI governance — describes research agenda, team members, and roundtable discussions with stakeholders. Contains NO institutional policy for students, staff, or teaching. Rejected as research_showcase_only. The 3 other NUS sources from the previous run (policy PDF, library guides) remain valid and unchanged. The needs_changes on clm-nus-instructor-transparency is a claim-level issue (LMS detail not in evidence snippet), not a source discovery issue.
